title: EntitySpawnEgg
description:
EntitySpawnEgg replaces vanilla's default spawn egg with a new, fancy, animated one.

It also works with modded entities that have a normal spawn egg.
body:
# EntitySpawnEgg
EntitySpawnEgg replaces vanilla's default spawn egg with a new, fancy, animated one.
![Spawn Egg icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115a3bcad919c3288bf213acae8f16deada2d616.png)
It also works with modded entities that have a normal spawn egg.
## It was commissioned by [@Limit小火柴](https://space.bilibili.com/43865538)
There is an extensive Config with many settings.
### It should be compatible with most mods.
![Spawn Egg items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d32f09c6ca6b70ec5eb29333be5b1dc47131a8c0.png)
Projects that are known to be not fully compatible：
Fresh Animations(Spawn Egg icon twitches);
Mythic Mounts(Handheld Spawn Egg cannot be displayed);
